class.name: ResonanceProbeData
class.brief_description: Resource storing baked probe data for reverb and pathing.
class.description: ResonanceProbeData holds the baked probe batch from Steam Audio. Assigned to [ResonanceProbeVolume]'s [member probe_data] property. Created automatically when baking probes; save the scene after baking to persist. Contains reflection data (Convolution/Parametric/Hybrid), optional pathing data, and optional static source/listener data. The baked reflection type must match [url=#ResonanceRuntimeConfig]ResonanceRuntimeConfig[/url] [member ResonanceRuntimeConfig.reflection_type] at runtime.

method.name: get_bake_layer_info
method.description: Returns bake layer statistics for debug/editor. Dictionary with keys: "total_size" (int), "layers" (Array of layer info).

members.member: Serialized probe batch data. Set automatically during bake.
Probe positions for visualization. Stored at bake time.
Hash of bake parameters. Used for compatibility checks.
Hash of pathing parameters. 0 if pathing not baked.
Baked reverb algorithm: Convolution (0), Parametric (1), Hybrid (2). -1 = legacy.
